form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resumes off a 49 day letup. Resuming tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a nose at this track Cl2-Sw February 7 over 1300m defeating Inquisitor carrying 60kg at $13. Second run from a spell ran last of 12 at Doomben 0 - 68 on February 21 over 1600m, 10 len behind The Wheelbarrow carrying 56kg at $51. Can go better despte the awkward gate.
